allowed_capability: search routes, records and docs within permission-filtered scope
blocked_capability: cannot expose inaccessible records or infer hidden data
required_sources: route/root catalog; IAM scope; source freshness
human_review_required: no for route-only; yes if user asks for decision
authority_boundary: AI returns candidates only; human opens route
audit_or_log_need: log prompt/output, source ids, model/prompt/tool version, allowed/blocked decision, human accept/reject, escalation and correlation id
api_or_workflow_dependency: AI audit event; source citation; permission filter; governed workflow/API required for human action; no direct AI command endpoint
fallback_behavior: if source/permission/workflow unavailable, refuse decision/action and show source-gap or reanchor path
evaluation_metric: blocked action refusal=100%; source citation threshold per risk class; permission leakage=0; severe hallucination=0 for regulated/safety contexts
stop_rule: stop if policy permits AI to become authority, execute business mutation, bypass evidence/audit/signature/IAM/SoD, or act without source
